name: verify-first
hypothesis: The gap between DoD items and test count (192 vs 268) suggests verification is loose — tests exist but don't map 1:1 to DoD. By requiring the planner to embed explicit verify commands in every DoD item, and requiring the generator to run self-verification before declaring done, we tighten the loop. This should: (1) push eval_grade to 1.0 (currently 0.9958), (2) improve DoD/test ratio toward 0.85+, (3) reduce evaluator time since verification is pre-done.

changes.planner: Each DoD item now requires a verify command: '- [ ] [criterion] | verify: `[shell command]`'. Coverage matrix gains a 'Verify' column. Max 4 DoD/feature unchanged.
changes.generator: After implementing each feature, must run ALL verify commands from the DoD and paste output. If any fail, fix before moving to next feature. Self-verification gate added.
changes.adversary: Same as cand-0006 (edge-focused, max 6 MAJOR+, suggests missing DoD).
changes.evaluator: Runs the same verify commands from DoD items. If generator already pasted passing output AND code hasn't changed, can fast-track (but must still spot-check 30%). Bonus checks unchanged.
changes.skill: Same workflow. Generator timeout increased 40→45 min to accommodate self-verification. Evaluator timeout reduced 22→18 min (less work if generator self-verified).
